text: ‘From whom shall I accept an offering?’; literally, ‘to whom shall I have regard?’ cf. Gen. 4.4.
Literally, ‘he who slays an ox (is as) he who murders a man’, etc.
‘At my own caprice I will choose the terrors’; literally, ‘I will choose the wanton outrages and the terrors’.
The Hebrew text of verses 17 and 18, which differs from the Latin version, is probably corrupt, and has called forth a variety of interpretations.
The geographical identifications found in the Latin text are by no means certain.
